message:
feat(cli): implement ensemble export/import commands with checksum-verified remote imports

Adds two new subcommands under ntm ensemble:

ensemble export <preset> --output <file>:
- Serializes a preset as portable TOML via ExportFromPreset.
- Supports --force to overwrite existing files.
- Outputs JSON summary in robot mode.

ensemble import <file-or-url>:
- Parses TOML, validates schema version and mode references against
  the catalog and registry.
- Local files import directly; remote URLs are blocked by default.
- Remote import requires --allow-remote AND --sha256 checksum — the
  downloaded bytes are verified against the provided SHA256 hash.
- Detects content conflicts when an imported preset with the same name
  but different content already exists.
- Validates the imported preset against the full registry (embedded +
  user + project) to catch cross-source conflicts.
- Writes to ensembles.imported.toml via SaveEnsemblesFile.

ensemble presets --imported:
- Filters the preset list to show only imported presets (source="imported").

Tests:
- TestRunEnsemblePresets_ImportedOnly: writes an imported file, verifies
  filter returns only the imported preset.
- TestEnsembleExportImport_RoundTrip: exports a built-in preset, adjusts
  the name, imports, and verifies it appears with source="imported".
- TestRunEnsembleImport_RemoteChecksum: spins up an httptest server,
  verifies that remote import without --allow-remote fails, wrong
  checksum fails, and correct checksum succeeds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -116,6 +116,8 @@ Primary usage:
 	bindEnsembleSharedFlags(cmd, &opts)
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleSpawnCmd())
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsemblePresetsCmd())
+	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleExportCmd())
+	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleImportCmd())
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleStatusCmd())
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleStopCmd())
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleSuggestCmd())
